ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the sample for tracking */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from where the sample was collected */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sample (e.g., In Transit, Testing, Completed) */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who collected the sample */,
  "collector_notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations made by the collector */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth at which the sample was collected */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the collection site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the collection site */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., rock, soil, water) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample being analyzed */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis (e.g., ICP, XRF) */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "ICP_Fe" REAL /* Iron content determined by ICP */,
  "XRF_Fe" REAL /* Iron content determined by XRF */,
  "ICP_Zn" REAL /* Zinc content determined by ICP */,
  "XRF_Zn" REAL /* Zinc content determined by XRF */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used for the analysis */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab where the analysis was performed */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who performed the analysis */,
  "quality_control_passed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the analysis passed quality control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES lab_locations ("lab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_test_method FOREIGN KEY ("test_method") REFERENCES test_methods ("method_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the sampling location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location's characteristics */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Description of environmental conditions at the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the analytical method (e.g., ICP, XRF) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analytical method */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the test method */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the test method */,
  "standard_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the standard or protocol used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status type */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., In Transit, Testing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "next_status" TEXT /* Next expected status in the sample's lifecycle */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample entered this status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* User's login name */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., technician, manager) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample for which the report was generated */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample being tracked */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of what changed about the sample */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who made the change */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the sample */,
  "old_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_histories_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_histories_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment's function */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was last calibrated */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Lab where the equipment is located */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the equipment (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES lab_locations ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_locations" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* The name of the laboratory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the lab */,
  "contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the lab manager */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the lab */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the lab */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of samples the lab can handle at a time */,
  "specializations" TEXT /* Specialized areas of testing the lab focuses on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id")
)
